title: Surgeries | Sojan Joseph MP
meta_description: I hold face-to-face and online surgeries using Zoom/Microsoft Teams. At each session, I'll be available to help with local issues.
text_excerpt: Surgeries | Sojan Joseph MP Find me on Facebook 01233 515107 Email Me HOME ABOUT About Me Parliamentary Record NEWS News Articles Newsletter Sign up Newsletters Press Releases Columns ENDORSERS & SUCCESSES Campaigns Missions USEFUL LINKS SURGERIES Coffee Morning HELP Contact Event Request Visit Parliament SURGERIES I hold face-to-face and online surgeries using Zoom/Microsoft Teams. At each session, I’ll be available to help with local issues. I hold regular face-to-face surgeries. I also have online advice surgeries via Zoom/Microsoft Teams (by appointment only). Please get in touch with me by email if you can’t get to my surgeries. At the surgeries, I’ll be available to help with various issues, such as education, environmental issues, antisocial behaviour, health and social services, highways, transport, and housing. I can also help constituents on various other issues, such as council tax, bin collections, housing issues, social services, schools and roads and payments, tax and national insurance, benefits, pensions and immigration. 01233 515107 sojan.joseph.mp@parliament.uk Book Appointment: Thursday 7th May 09:30 - 11:30, Central Ashford Virtual Surgery Please type the characters * This helps us prevent spam, thank you.
